name: golang-github-jacobsa-bazilfuse-dev
title: golang-github-jacobsa-bazilfuse-dev
description:
fork of bazil.org/fuse for gcsfuse
This package is an implementation detail of github.com/jacobsa/fuse, which is
used by gcsfuse. You likely should be using bazil.org/fuse (contained in
Debian package golang-bazil-fuse-dev) directly.
.
Changes from upstream are:
.
* The function SetOption allows for setting arbitrary mount options.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-jacobsa-bazilfuse-dev because fork of bazil.org/fuse for gcsfuse.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-jacobsa-bazilfuse-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-jacobsa-bazilfuse-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-jacobsa-bazilfuse-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
